name: file
description: Reads the unlock key from a file (base64 by default, or raw bytes). Pair with a tmpfs mount or a secret injected as a file (Docker/K8s secret, CSI driver).

vars.name: CEV_KEY_FILE
vars.description: Path to a file containing the key.

vars.name: CEV_KEY_FILE_RAW
vars.description: Set 'true' if the file holds 32 raw bytes instead of base64.
